Bash("$PYTHON" -c "from PIL import Image; print\(''pillow ok''\)")

Bash(env/Scripts/python.exe manage.py shell -c "import requests; r=requests.get\('http://127.0.0.1:8765/'\); print\('size', len\(r.text\)\); print\('has navbar:', 'mainNav' in r.text\); print\('has hero:', 'hero-section' in r.text\); print\('has footer:', 'footer-brand' in r.text\); print\('has 17 projects:', r.text.count\('portfolio-card'\)\)")

Bash(env/Scripts/python.exe -c "import os; os.environ.setdefault\('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE','sergio.settings'\); import django; django.setup\(\); from django.test import Client; c=Client\(\); r=c.get\('/'\); print\('status', r.status_code\); print\('size', len\(r.content\)\); body=r.content.decode\(\); print\('navbar:', 'mainNav' in body\); print\('hero:', 'hero-section' in body\); print\('footer:', 'footer-brand' in body\); print\('whatsapp float:', 'whatsapp-float' in body\); print\('back-to-top:', 'backToTop' in body\); print\('pcards:', body.count\('portfolio-card'\)\); print\('static refs:', body.count\('static/mainapp'\)\)")

Bash(env/Scripts/python.exe -c "import os; os.environ.setdefault\('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE','sergio.settings'\); import django; django.setup\(\); from django.test import Client; c=Client\(HTTP_HOST='localhost'\); r=c.get\('/'\); body=r.content.decode\(\); print\('status', r.status_code\); print\('navbar:', 'mainNav' in body\); print\('hero:', 'hero-section' in body\); print\('about:', 'about-section' in body\); print\('services:', 'services-section' in body\); print\('pricing:', 'pricing-section' in body\); print\('experience:', 'experience-section' in body\); print\('portfolio:', 'portfolio-section' in body\); print\('testimonials:', 'testimonials-section' in body\); print\('contact:', 'contact-section' in body\); print\('footer:', 'footer-brand' in body\); print\('whatsapp float:', 'whatsapp-float' in body\); print\('back-to-top:', 'backToTop' in body\); print\('pcards:', body.count\('portfolio-card'\)\); print\('static refs:', body.count\('/static/mainapp/'\)\)")
